label: Contract Target System
info: Reference Contract Target System (UC-05-01, DCS-IR-SI-02/-05): receives the DCS deployment dispatch, verifies the payload's canonical content hash, returns a synchronous ack, and then acts as a REAL target — it POSTs the authoritative acknowledgement callback (status + execution-evidence receipt) and a measured KPI report back to the DCS deployment-callback endpoint, authenticated with the shared callback secret (DCS-FR-SM-10/-12, DCS-FR-CWE-09/-31).

name: Verify content hash and build ack
Build acknowledgement callback
Build measured KPI callback
Log rejected KPI callback
